zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Ergadia MacDougall於大約1350年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，她的父親Eóghan John Macdougall35歲，母親Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia14歲。她於大約1375年與Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1419年12月30日在她的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏洛斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Ergadia MacDougall于大约1350年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，她的父亲Eóghan John Macdougall35岁，母亲Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia14岁。她于大约1375年与Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight在英国苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1419年12月30日在她的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏洛斯。

nameMeanings.name: MacDougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Ergadia MacDougall was born about 1350, in Argyll, Scotland, her father, Eóghan John Macdougall, was 35 and her mother, Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia, was 14. She married Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight about 1375, in Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 30 December 1419, in her hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Culross, Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Ergadia MacDougall est née environ 1350, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Eóghan John Macdougall, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joanna Jonet Isaac d’Ergadia, avait 14 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight environ 1375, à Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 décembre 1419, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Culross, Fife, Écosse.

Sie hat um 1375 in Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Dezember 1419 im Alter von 70 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Culross, Fife, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Ergadia MacDougallが約1350年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Eóghan John Macdougallは35歳，母Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadiaは14歳であった。約1375年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルでSir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1419年12月30日に故郷で70歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフクウルロスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Ergadia MacDougall(이)가 대략 1350년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eóghan John Macdougall(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 대략 1375년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이에서 Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 12월 30일 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프 컬로스에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight aproximadamente 1375, em Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.Grandtully, Perth and Kinross, Scotland,: грандтулли, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Ergadia MacDougall родилась около 1350 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Eóghan John Macdougall было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia, 14. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Stewart of Innermeath, Knight около 1375 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 30 декабря 1419 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности кулросс, фиф, Шотландия.
